_meta.generated_note: Consolidated source map of every Gotcha Force (GG4E/NTSC-U) game-logic function the project's decompilation research has assigned a concrete role. Built by cross-referencing behavior-notes.md sections (a)-(bb), attack-mechanics-findings.md / -ledger.json, and state-anim-dispatch-802d3570.json against ghidra-export/_index.tsv for canonical name+chunk. One entry per address (deduped). Only functions with an identifiable game-logic role are included; addresses cited only in passing (constants, data-table addresses, mid-function instruction PCs, engine calls named without a role) were skipped -- see cited_addresses_skipped_roleless.

confidence_legend.DERIVED_ROM: role read directly from decompiled C / raw-ROM data (matches the notebook's DERIVED tier)
confidence_legend.INFERRED: role inferred from field reuse / call shape / handler routing / confirmed asset-container decode, not a direct gameplay-code read
confidence_legend.NAMED_ONLY: cited in prose but NOT a function entry in _index.tsv (mid-function PC, differently-attributed symbol, or engine/library symbol named without a Gotcha-Force gameplay role) -- name is the prose/engine-map name

_meta.cited_addresses_skipped_roleless: ~40 cited 0x8xxxxxxx tokens resolve to data/constant addresses (SDA floats e.g. 0x80437448, dispatch/lookup-table bases e.g. 0x802d3570 / 0x802f2e28 / 0x802d46e0 / 0x802c4760, mid-function instruction PCs e.g. 0x80055c00 / 0x8005c7d8 / 0x8005d4b0) rather than role-bearing function entries; those are referenced inside the role text of the owning function rather than given their own entry. A handful of camera sub-thunks (0x8000d5a0/d5f4/d600/d60c/d644) and boundary markers were also left out as roleless.

functions.name: zz_000bda4_

functions.name: mutual_actor_contact_mask_update
functions.role: per-frame pairwise actor-contact pass: double-loops the 6 active borgs (stride 0x1e00 from DAT_803c4e84), and when both actors mutually mark each other in their +0x71e and +0x71f slot bitmasks, pushes the slower/airborne one out via zz_0035ca4_ with the other actor's motion vector +0x1cc

functions.name: zz_002caa8_
functions.role: push-apart weight applier: scales an actor's push-apart accumulator/velocity field +0xb4 by a fractional weight passed in from the contact loop in battle_frame_target_action_dispatch

functions.name: zz_002ce44_
functions.role: per-frame contact-force application pass: iterates actor slot lists and adds an active hitting actor's motion vector +0x1cc into the passive actor's position/velocity (collision push resolution)

functions.name: zz_0035ca4_
functions.role: collision-impulse applier: adds a supplied impulse vector into the target actor's position accumulator +0x1cc and propagates it to all actors in its contact mask (the push-out primitive used by mutual_actor_contact_mask_update)

functions.name: FUN_80067310
functions.role: core velocity->position integrator: advances world position +0x20/+0x24/+0x28 by horizontal speed +0x44 projected through facing angle (sin/cos via zz_0045204_/zz_0045238_) scaled by frame speed +0x5f4*+0x5f8, then integrates ground accel +0x4c into +0x44 and vertical accel +0x50 into +0x48 with floor/ceiling clamps; calls ground-snap zz_0068030_

functions.name: zz_0067458_
functions.role: velocity integrator variant: calls FUN_80067310 then additionally clamps horizontal speed +0x44 to per-actor cap +0x678 and vertical speed +0x48 into the band [+0x680, +0x67c]

functions.name: zz_0068030_
functions.role: gravity ground-snap: when the actor's foot (Y +0x24 + foot-offset +0x668) would sink below the stage floor plane DAT_8043625c+0x34 and vertical velocity +0x48 is downward, zeroes +0x48 and snaps Y +0x24 up onto the floor (returns landed flag)

functions.name: FUN_8005ef08
functions.role: per-move ground/terrain height snap + wall block: queries floor height at the actor's XZ via FUN_8003d6e4, writes Y +0x24, and if the step-up exceeds ledge threshold +0x674 restores the previous position (+0x2c/+0x30/+0x34) blocking the move; returns 1 when blocked

functions.name: FUN_8003d6e4
functions.role: terrain raycast: tests the actor's XZ position against stage collision triangles (barycentric edge tests) and returns the floor Y at that point, used by movement height-snap and knockback distance
functions.evidence: if (((fVar2 * fVar6 <= fVar5 * fVar3) && (fVar3 * fVar7 <= fVar6 * fVar4)) && (fVar4 * fVar5 <= fVar7 * fVar2))

functions.name: zz_005ee0c_
functions.role: wall-collision resolution + state transition: after FUN_8005ef08 reports a blocked move, computes remaining slide distance from prev-vs-cur position, boosts speed +0x44 toward the wall-slide direction (atan2 via FUN_800452a0 into facing +0x5ae), sets impact flag +0x5e0|0x2000000, and transitions the actor to state 0xc via zz_005ec04_

functions.name: zz_005ec20_
functions.role: knockback launch setup: reads knockback strength +0x702 (clamped 0..15), sets horizontal launch speed +0x44 from launch-table DAT_802dd8a0[strength] scaled by +0x298/+0xc4, sets ground decel +0x4c and vertical accel/speed +0x50/+0x48

functions.name: zz_005ecb0_
functions.role: post-launch facing update: while a knockback (+0x702) is active and the launch hasn't settled, rotates the actor's heading toward the knockback direction +0x284 via turn helper zz_00670dc_, and latches settled flag +0x1d9b when speed +0x44 drops below threshold +0x1dac

functions.name: FUN_8005ed38
functions.role: knockback velocity-vector builder: from knockback strength +0x702 (+2 when airborne bit +0x6fd&0x80) picks magnitude from DAT_802d3664[strength], splits it into ground accel components +0x44/+0x48 via sin/cos of knockback pitch -+0x282, and sets decel/gravity +0x4c/+0x50

functions.name: zz_006a5a4_
functions.role: hit-reaction exit/cleanup: on knockback/hit-react recovery clears collision-active flags, resets the reaction bookkeeping byte +0x590, and (player-controlled path) applies a position offset before returning control

functions.name: zz_005c15c_
functions.role: per-actor per-frame limb/attachment reset before state dispatch: calls zz_005c080_, masks the +0x5e0 flag word (keep 0x5ff0040), and zeroes the per-limb transform triads +0x18d4/+0x18d6/+0x18d8 for every limb in the actor's limb list (+0x4b0[+0xb0..])

functions.name: zz_005c080_
functions.role: per-frame motion/flag reset: restores default per-frame accel +0x1dcc and step +0x1d9c, masks guard flags +0x272 down to 0x43, clears Power-Burst arm +0x6fb, and runs the actor's vtable teardown thunk +0x4c4

functions.name: zz_005bab8_
functions.role: per-frame stat-tier timer + facing smoothing: decrements the buff/debuff duration timer +0x750 and, on expiry, reverts the accumulated param-tier delta +0x74e via apply_actor_param_tier_delta_127; separately eases the current facing-scale +0xb4 toward target +0xb8 and mirrors it into +0x58/+0x5c/+0x60/+0xc0/+0xc4

functions.name: reset_actor_param_tier

functions.role: weapon-FIRE action handler: sets fire state +0x6ee, decrements the burst counter +0x6ef, consumes ammo via zz_006dbe0_, and on success spawns the projectile through zz_006ee14_ selecting the muzzle by borg type (family 10 -> muzzle 4, family 3 -> muzzles 0 and 2 when +0x7c8 set, else muzzle 0); the trigger that turns an attack command into a projectile

functions.name: FUN_8006f4b8
functions.role: projectile visual/PARTICLE hit-callback (object+0x10c): attaches/updates the projectile's render sub-node (+0xe0) at its world matrix +0x114 via zz_00076d0_ and issues effect-event 0x47 (zz_00097b4_); the per-frame draw/trail hook for the flying projectile

functions.name: zz_00840b8_
functions.role: projectile/effect OWNER-LIVENESS despawn: when the object is in a fly state and its owning borg (+0x90) has died (owner +0x18 state) or morphed to a different type (owner +1000 != cached +0x94), flips the object to despawn state +0x18=2 and requests teardown (zz_008aff0_); prevents orphaned projectiles/effects after the owner leaves
functions.evidence: chunk_0012.c:3226-3228 owner-changed test then :3231 `*(undefined1 *)(param_1 + 0x18) = 2;` :3235 `zz_008aff0_(param_1);`; called from FUN_8006f0cc chunk_0009.c:3871

functions.name: zz_002fc18_
functions.role: hit-REACTION EFFECT selector: on a fresh hit (target +0x2ae==0) latches reaction id +0x2ae=4 and derives a reaction/effect variant from the hit-strength byte and the impact speed +0x7fc (stepping the low bits by float thresholds); feeds the visual hit-spark/reaction chosen when a hitbox connects
